name: regression-keyword-guard-mismatch
description: AI assigns an acceptable-use quote to mandatory_arbitration. The keyword guard catches the mismatch because the quote contains no arbitration keyword.
documentText: You agree that you will not under any circumstances attempt to disrupt or tamper with the servers, run automated scrapers, or upload malicious code.
